text.content: Gothic Modern: From Darkness to Light

rich_text.plain_text: Gothic Modern: From Darkness to Light

text.content: : This traveling exhibition explores how modern-era artists found inspiration in medieval art—melding centuries-old aesthetics with modern concepts. It features a tailored selection curated by the National Museum’s own curatorial team, offering a fresh, location-specific experience.(

rich_text.plain_text: : This traveling exhibition explores how modern-era artists found inspiration in medieval art—melding centuries-old aesthetics with modern concepts. It features a tailored selection curated by the National Museum’s own curatorial team, offering a fresh, location-specific experience.(

text.content: : Contemporary artist A K Dolven's "amazon" exhibition—likely a concept-driven installation—runs alongside the Gothic Modern show. The contrast between medieval-inspired art and Dolven’s modern sensibility promises a compelling dual experience.(

text.content: : Astrup Fearnley Museum of Modern Art, Tjuvholmen

rich_text.plain_text: : Astrup Fearnley Museum of Modern Art, Tjuvholmen

text.content: : The museum showcases newly acquired works alongside its established collection. Expect contemporary and international artists—typical of Astrup Fearnley’s ever-evolving modern art focus.(

text.content: : Oslo (venue TBD, part of nationwide artist-juried showcase series)

rich_text.plain_text: : Oslo (venue TBD, part of nationwide artist-juried showcase series)

text.content: : One of Norway’s oldest and most democratic art platforms, this juried group exhibition brings together a wide range of contemporary voices from across the country.(
